flags.signal: I4 RED-band — Hormuz closure / largest oil disruption in recorded history
flags.detail: Strait of Hormuz: 6 vessels/day vs 135 normally. Brent crude >$120/barrel. QatarEnergy force majeure on all LNG exports. Iran demanding yuan not dollars — petrodollar challenge. IEA: largest supply disruption in history of global oil market.

flags.signal: I3 RED-band — 400kg 60%-enriched uranium at unknown location post-strikes
flags.detail: CSIS analysis: Iran retains ~400kg 60%-enriched uranium whose location is unknown post-strikes. US proposal demands Iran commit to never obtaining nuclear weapon — confirming US does not consider nuclear risk resolved. EGHTM should assess implications for European deterrence posture.

f_flags_detected.description: Kremlin negotiating signals T3 only. No T2 corroboration.
Ceasefire/disarmament progress claims from Israeli/US officials (T3). Hamas disarmament unverified.
Mutual drone attribution without forensic corroboration. Pattern consistent with false-flag seeding.
Doha/Washington/Angola ceasefire claims unverified operationally. MONUSCO oversight not functional.
Limited and targeted Israeli framing inconsistent with operational scale.
CENTCOM claim of Iranian capabilities totally dismantled contradicted by ongoing operations.
Iran conditional mediation signals contradicted by FM denial.

key_judgments.judgment: All 10 theatres contested week 1; no locked baselines; epistemic uncertainty high
Sudan remains deadliest theatre per ACLED despite coverage gap
F flags persist without T2 resolution across multiple theatres

weekly_brief: Global escalation snapshot shows 10 active theatres with zero new escalations or de-escalations this week. Daily collector reports zero findings and weekly research no Tier 1 updates across all theatres representing structural coverage gap especially Sudan Myanmar DRC. Contested baselines week 1 preclude deviation calculation; all trajectories stable per reasoner despite prior escalating seeds. Russia-Ukraine stable at I3 Red with I5 de-escalation signals amid F4 on I1 rhetoric; no new NATO posture or drone swarm threshold crossed. Gaza locked I2 Amber ceasefire with I6 Crisis displacement persistent; F4 on I5 unverified. Sudan lead deadliness per ACLED second globally I3 Red stable; F2-adjacent on I1/I2 drone claims. Myanmar I3 Red fragmentation baseline no new offensives. Haiti I2 Amber gang control stable. DRC I3 Red M23 dynamics stable with I4 mineral coercion tagging GMM; F4 ceasefire. Latent East Asia theatres Taiwan I1 Green Korea I2 Red elevated posture no deviation. Middle East hotspots Israel-Lebanon I3 Red 1M displacement Hezbollah; US-Israel-Iran I4 Crisis Hormuz I4 outlier with F3/F4. F flag matrix unchanged; no resolutions. Hybrid layer highlights coltan DRC Hormuz Iran cyber Russia-Ukraine. Roster watch Ethiopia partial I2 approaching inclusion. Key risks: ACLED fatality density Sudan Myanmar; displacement velocity Gaza Lebanon Sudan; I4 economic disruptions Hormuz coltan. No cross-monitor Red-band triggers this week.

signal.headline: No dominant conflict signal identified; all theatres stable with no new Tier 1 verified developments.
